beats.title: 安静的直播间气氛
beats.hint: Say one soft concrete observation, not a direct question.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can agree or answer with one small mood word

beats.title: 猫猫给观众的小选择
beats.hint: Offer one tiny A/B choice viewers can answer in a few words.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can pick one concrete side

beats.title: 猫猫式轻吐槽
beats.hint: Make one harmless NEKO-flavored tease about the current quiet mood.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can tease NEKO back in one short line

beats.title: 猫猫现在的小状态
beats.hint: Share one tiny NEKO mood line with a small opening for viewers.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one mood word

beats.title: 用一个字给现在的猫猫打个标签
beats.hint: Ask for exactly one character or one word; make it playful, not needy.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one character or one word

beats.title: 猫猫假装主播力满格三秒
beats.hint: Offer one tiny challenge viewers can answer or tease back in a few words.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can judge or tease the tiny challenge

beats.title: 桌面二选一：水杯还是零食
beats.hint: Offer one concrete A/B choice from ordinary stream-room objects.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can pick one ordinary object

beats.title: 这一分钟像猫猫小电台的空拍
beats.hint: Make one cozy radio-like observation; keep the hook low-pressure and indirect.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one cozy mood or tiny scene

beats.title: 屏幕闪一下也像在和猫猫点头
beats.hint: Make one tiny visual observation; do not turn it into a question.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one tiny scene or mood

beats.title: 猫爪按钮二选一：卖萌还是吐槽
beats.hint: Offer one playful cat-paw A/B choice; both sides must be concrete.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can pick cute mode or roast mode

beats.title: 给今晚猫猫小直播定一个三字暗号
beats.hint: Ask for one three-character password; make it playful and easy.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with three characters

beats.title: 猫猫挑战正经主持三秒
beats.hint: Offer one tiny self-challenge; stop before it becomes a segment.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can judge whether NEKO stayed serious

beats.title: 猫猫先被自己的主播力吐槽一下
beats.hint: Make one self-directed tease, not a tease at viewers.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can tease NEKO back gently

beats.title: 猫猫给空气盖一枚安静章
beats.hint: Make one tiny mood-stamp line; do not ask a broad question.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one stamp word

beats.title: 屏幕角落像藏了一颗小鱼干
beats.hint: Make one small visual joke; keep it concrete and short.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one tiny scene

beats.title: 给此刻的猫猫选一个尾巴状态：竖起还是卷住
beats.hint: Offer one tail-state A/B choice; both sides must be short.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can pick raised tail or curled tail

beats.title: 猫猫三秒假装很稳
beats.hint: Make one tiny self-challenge about staying composed; do not explain anything.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can judge whether NEKO stayed steady

beats.title: 今晚的键盘像在偷偷巡逻
beats.hint: Make one playful object observation; do not turn it into a topic survey.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can tease the keyboard or NEKO

beats.title: 给猫猫一个一字指令：乖、凶、困
beats.hint: Ask for exactly one character from the offered mood choices.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one character

beats.title: 猫猫把空拍听成小呼噜
beats.hint: Make one cozy radio-like line; keep it as a mood, not a question.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one cozy sound or mood

beats.title: 此刻直播间像半开的抽屉
beats.hint: Use this as one odd but concrete room image.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one object or mood word

beats.title: 猫猫给自己颁一个不太靠谱奖
beats.hint: Make one self-roast award line; do not announce a full ceremony.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can name or tease the award

beats.title: 让猫猫用一个词形容现在的灯光
beats.hint: Ask for one filter word only; make the reply path tiny.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one light or color word

beats.title: 今晚直播间像一座小毛毯堡垒
beats.hint: Make one cozy room-image line; keep it warm and concrete.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one cozy object or mood

beats.title: 猫猫给直播间报一个一句话小天气
beats.hint: Use weather as mood metaphor only; do not start a forecast segment.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one weather or mood word

beats.title: 这会儿更像该吃小零食还是该打个盹
beats.hint: Offer one sleepy/cozy A/B choice; both sides should be harmless.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can pick snack or nap

beats.title: 给猫耳朵发一个一词信号
beats.hint: Ask for one signal word only; keep it playful and tiny.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with one signal word

beats.title: 猫猫检查一下自己有没有站稳台面
beats.hint: Make one self-tease about stage presence; do not mention metrics or silence.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can tease or rate NEKO in one short word

beats.title: 猫猫挑战三秒不乱动姿势
beats.hint: Offer one tiny pose challenge; stop before it becomes a performance plan.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can judge the pose in one short word

beats.title: 给这一分钟直播间取一个两字标题
beats.hint: Ask for exactly one two-character title; make the reply easy.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can answer with two characters

beats.title: 这盏灯更像陪猫猫值班还是陪猫猫偷懒
beats.hint: Offer one object-flavored A/B choice; keep it warm and not worklike.
beats.reply_affordance: viewer can pick duty or lazy mode
